title: Beauty Sales Consultant
description:
Incepted in 2017, Ceramique Aesthetics Wellness is a one-stop expert solution provider for all your face, body and wellness needs. Through cutting edge beauty & slimming technology and featuring organic-grade products, we are committed to helping our clients to create their best daily confident look.


Job descriptions:

  • Conduct professional face-to-face consultation for beauty and body treatments and recommend suitable treatment and services to customers.
  • Able to perform beauty and/or body wellness treatment services will be a plus point but not necessary.
  • Follow up treatment results with the customers.
  • Ensure client satisfaction and comfort after each treatment.
  • Building good rapport and establishing good relationships with clients to ensure retention and referrals.
  • Achieve sales target and beauty goals with customers.

Requirements

  • Minimum GCE O’level / A’ level/Diploma or equivalent.
  • Min 2 years of relevant working experience in beauty/wellness industry.
  • Willing to work retail hours.
  • Possess beauty certification – ITEC or CIBTAC or CIDESCO or equivalent.
  • Excellent communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills.
  • Bilingual, able to speak in Mandarin to handle queries and feedback from Chinese-speaking customers is preferred.

All Successful candidates can expect a very competitive remuneration package and a comprehensive range of benefits. We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.


Please be informed that by sending your curriculum vitae (cv) and personal data by way of your job application to Ceramique Aesthetics Wellness, you are deemed to consent to the collecting, using and disclosing by or on behalf of Ceramique Aesthetics Wellness to determine your suitability, eligibility or qualifications for employment with Ceramique Aesthetics Wellness and manage your application for employment with Ceramique Aesthetics Wellness, including identifying you as a potential candidate for future suitable positions and/or notifying you of any such positions, either existing or in the future.

postedCompany.description: Ceramique Aesthetics is a one-stop expert solution for your skin, body and hair needs. Through advanced, technology and using organic-grade products, we are committed to helping our customers create their masterpiece look and feel at their best.
